task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the official acquisition log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/evidence/Chain_of_Custody_Log.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the required Autopsy case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Autopsy GUI showing the 'New Case Information' dialog or the main window with the case name 'Evidence_Audit_2024' and case number 'IA-001'.

task_completion.description: Agent calculates the current SHA-256 hashes of the seized USB drives.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing commands like 'sha256sum' being run on the .dd files in /home/ga/evidence/, or Autopsy displaying the computed hashes for the data sources.

task_completion.description: Agent analyzes the drives in Autopsy to find files modified or created after the seizure date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy interface showing the file system, timeline, or search results for the .dd images, specifically examining file modification/creation dates after 2023-05-01.

task_completion.description: Agent writes the final Audit Report with the required fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing the file /home/ga/Reports/integrity_audit.txt being edited, containing the fields TAMPERED_IMAGE, ORIGINAL_SHA256, CURRENT_SHA256, PLANTED_FILES, and CONCLUSION.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the Autopsy GUI to create the case and analyze evidence.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Autopsy application open and being interacted with, not just terminal commands or scripts bypassing the GUI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely calculated or viewed the file hashes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the output of hash calculation commands (e.g., sha256sum) or the hash values displayed within Autopsy's data source details.

integrity.description: Verify the agent filled out the report with actual findings rather than placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The integrity_audit.txt file should contain specific hash strings, a specific .dd filename, and specific planted filenames, rather than generic template text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case Name: Evidence_Audit_2024. Case Number: IA-001. Log File: /home/ga/evidence/Chain_of_Custody_Log.txt. Report File: /home/ga/Reports/integrity_audit.txt.
